Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 33 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. A Primer on Long-Duration Life Support 19 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 49 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. OkCupid gave 3M dating-app photos to facial recognition firm, FTC says 70 upvotes, 16 comments
  6. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 213 upvotes, 68 comments
  7. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 432 upvotes, 154 comments
  8. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1683 upvotes, 666 comments
  9. Combinators 112 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 81 upvotes, 24 comments
  11. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  12. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 288 upvotes, 114 comments
  13. GitHub's Historic Uptime 27 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 101 upvotes, 37 comments
  15. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 144 upvotes, 57 comments
  16. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1600 upvotes, 797 comments
  17. South Polar Times 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. RubyGems Fracture Incident Report 64 upvotes, 23 comments
  19. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 586 upvotes, 300 comments
  20. Show HN: How This Graybeard Built the Fastest and Freest Postgres BM25 Search 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 23 upvotes, 7 comments
  22. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 165 upvotes, 96 comments
  23. Teenage Engineering's PO-32 acoustic modem and synth implementation 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 201 upvotes, 134 comments
  25. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 98 upvotes, 62 comments
  26. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 704 upvotes, 583 comments
  27. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 23 upvotes, 15 comments
  28. Show HN: PhAIL – Real-robot benchmark for AI models 10 upvotes, 8 comments
  29. Good code will still win 69 upvotes, 120 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 3:30am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
